name: Veritiv Corporation
description: Veritiv Corporation is a leading business-to-business provider of packaging, facility, and print solutions. Headquartered in the United States, the company offers a comprehensive range of products and services, including structural and graphic packaging, automation, workflow equipment, and kitting and fulfillment services. Veritiv operates a vast network of distribution centers across North America, serving a diverse customer base by delivering innovative supply chain solutions that enhance operational efficiency and sustainability. Following its acquisition by Clayton, Dubilier & Rice, the company continues to focus on providing value-added services and specialized expertise to help businesses optimize their packaging and facility operations.
